cases.name: 複数グループの代表例

input.factory: () => ({ makeLine(label, point) { return this.name + ":" + label + "=" + (this.base + point * this.rate); }, groups: [{ name: "north", base: 10, rate: 2, entries: [["A", 3], ["B", 0]] }, { name: "south", base: 5, rate: 4, entries: [["C", 2]] }] })

() => ({ makeLine(label, point) { return this.code + "-" + label + ":" + (this.start - point + this.offset); }, groups: [{ code: "empty", start: 0, offset: 0, entries: [] }, { code: "west", start: 20, offset: 5, entries: [["x", 4], ["y", 9]] }] })

cases.name: グループごとのthisで条件が変わる

input.factory: () => ({ makeLine(label, point) { const mark = point >= this.limit ? "high" : "low"; return this.team + "/" + label + "/" + mark + "/" + (point + this.bonus); }, groups: [{ team: "red", limit: 5, bonus: 1, entries: [["p", 5], ["q", 4]] }, { team: "blue", limit: 2, bonus: -1, entries: [["r", 1], ["s", 2], ["t", 3]] }] })
() => ({ makeLine(label, point) { return this.name + label + point; }, groups: [] })
